message: test: cover core iteration zero state machines

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,122 @@
+import Foundation
+import Observation
+
+enum SpeechModelBackend: Equatable {
+    case whisper
+    case fluidAudio
+}
+
+enum WhisperLogLevel: Equatable {
+    case errorOnly
+}
+
+struct WhisperRuntimeOptions: Equatable {
+    var verbose: Bool
+    var logLevel: WhisperLogLevel
+    var prewarm: Bool
+    var load: Bool
+}
+
+struct SpeechModelDescriptor: Equatable {
+    var id: String
+    var backend: SpeechModelBackend
+    var whisperVariant: String?
+    var cachePathComponents: [String]
+    var fluidAudioVariant: String?
+
+    static let whisperSmallEnglish = SpeechModelDescriptor(
+        id: "openai_whisper-small.en",
+        backend: .whisper,
+        whisperVariant: "small.en",
+        cachePathComponents: ["models", "openai", "whisper-small.en"],
+        fluidAudioVariant: nil
+    )
+}
+
+@MainActor
+protocol SpeechModelLoading: AnyObject {
+    func isCached(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor) async throws -> Bool
+    func download(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor, progress: @Sendable @escaping (Double) -> Void) async throws
+    func load(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor, whisperOptions: WhisperRuntimeOptions) async throws
+}
+
+@MainActor
+@Observable
+final class SpeechModelManager {
+    enum Phase: Equatable {
+        case idle
+        case loading
+        case ready
+        case error
+    }
+
+    private let catalogByID: [String: SpeechModelDescriptor]
+    private let loader: any SpeechModelLoading
+
+    private(set) var phase: Phase = .idle
+    private(set) var errorMessage: String?
+    private(set) var downloadProgress: Double?
+    private(set) var loadedModelID: String?
+
+    init(
+        catalog: [SpeechModelDescriptor],
+        loader: any SpeechModelLoading
+    ) {
+        catalogByID = Dictionary(uniqueKeysWithValues: catalog.map { ($0.id, $0) })
+        self.loader = loader
+    }
+
+    func load(modelID: String?) async {
+        if phase == .loading {
+            return
+        }
+
+        let requestedID = modelID ?? loadedModelID
+        guard let requestedID, let model = catalogByID[requestedID] else {
+            phase = .error
+            errorMessage = "Speech model not found."
+            return
+        }
+
+        if phase == .ready, loadedModelID == requestedID {
+            return
+        }
+
+        if phase == .ready, loadedModelID != requestedID {
+            loadedModelID = nil
+            phase = .idle
+        }
+
+        phase = .loading
+        errorMessage = nil
+        downloadProgress = nil
+
+        do {
+            if try await !loader.isCached(model) {
+                try await loader.download(model) { [weak self] progress in
+                    Task { @MainActor in
+                        self?.downloadProgress = progress
+                    }
+                }
+                downloadProgress = nil
+            }
+
+            try await loader.load(
+                model,
+                whisperOptions: WhisperRuntimeOptions(
+                    verbose: false,
+                    logLevel: .errorOnly,
+                    prewarm: false,
+                    load: true
+                )
+            )
+
+            loadedModelID = model.id
+            downloadProgress = nil
+            phase = .ready
+        } catch {
+            phase = .error
+            errorMessage = error.localizedDescription
+        }
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class HotkeyEngineTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testInitialStateStartsIdleWithNoPressedKeys() {
+        let engine = HotkeyEngine(bindings: .defaultBindings)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(engine.activeMode, .idle)
+        XCTAssertEqual(engine.pressedKeys, [])
+    }
+
+    func testExactPushToTalkChordStartsRecording() {
+        let engine = HotkeyEngine(bindings: .defaultBindings)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(engine.process(.flagsChanged(.rightCommand)), [])
+
+        let effects = engine.process(.flagsChanged(.rightOption))
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(effects, [.start(.pushToTalk)])
+        XCTAssertEqual(engine.activeMode, .pushToTalk)
+        XCTAssertEqual(engine.pressedKeys, [.rightCommand, .rightOption])
+    }
+
+    func testAdditionalKeysDoNotStopPushToTalkWhileChordRemainsHeld() {
+        let engine = HotkeyEngine(bindings: .defaultBindings)
+        _ = engine.process(.flagsChanged(.rightCommand))
+        _ = engine.process(.flagsChanged(.rightOption))
+
+        let effects = engine.process(.keyDown(.tab))
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(effects, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(engine.activeMode, .pushToTalk)
+    }
+
+    func testReleasingAnyPushChordKeyStopsRecording() {
+        let engine = HotkeyEngine(bindings: .defaultBindings)
+        _ = engine.process(.flagsChanged(.rightCommand))
+        _ = engine.process(.flagsChanged(.rightOption))
+
+        let effects = engine.process(.keyUp(.rightOption))
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(effects, [.stop])
+        XCTAssertEqual(engine.activeMode, .idle)
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class PipelineGateTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testAcquireSucceedsOnlyWhenNoOwnerIsPresent() {
+        let gate = PipelineGate()
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(gate.acquire(.liveRecording))
+        XCTAssertFalse(gate.acquire(.transcriptionLab))
+        XCTAssertEqual(gate.currentOwner, .liveRecording)
+    }
+
+    func testReleaseIgnoresNonOwners() {
+        let gate = PipelineGate()
+        XCTAssertTrue(gate.acquire(.liveRecording))
+
+        gate.release(.transcriptionLab)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(gate.currentOwner, .liveRecording)
+    }
+
+    func testReleaseClearsCurrentOwnerForMatchingOwner() {
+        let gate = PipelineGate()
+        XCTAssertTrue(gate.acquire(.liveRecording))
+
+        gate.release(.liveRecording)
+
+        XCTAssertNil(gate.currentOwner)
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+import Foundation
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class SettingsStoreTests: XCTestCase {
+    private var suiteName: String!
+    private var defaults: UserDefaults!
+
+    override func setUp() {
+        super.setUp()
+        suiteName = "SettingsStoreTests.\(UUID().uuidString)"
+        defaults = UserDefaults(suiteName: suiteName)
+        defaults.removePersistentDomain(forName: suiteName)
+    }
+
+    override func tearDown() {
+        defaults.removePersistentDomain(forName: suiteName)
+        defaults = nil
+        suiteName = nil
+        super.tearDown()
+    }
+
+    func testInitializationWritesBackManualNilCheckDefaults() throws {
+        _ = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(defaults.object(forKey: "frontmostWindowContextEnabled") as? Bool, false)
+        XCTAssertEqual(defaults.object(forKey: "postPasteLearningEnabled") as? Bool, true)
+        XCTAssertEqual(defaults.object(forKey: "ignoreOtherSpeakers") as? Bool, false)
+        XCTAssertEqual(defaults.object(forKey: "playSounds") as? Bool, true)
+    }
+
+    func testDefaultPushToTalkBindingUsesRightCommandAndRightOption() throws {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.pushToTalkChord, try HotkeyChord(keys: [.rightCommand, .rightOption]))
+        XCTAssertNotNil(defaults.data(forKey: "chordBinding.pushToTalk"))
+    }
+
+    func testUpdatingSpeechModelPersistsToUserDefaults() throws {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+
+        store.speechModelID = "openai_whisper-small"
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(defaults.string(forKey: "speechModel"), "openai_whisper-small")
+    }
+
+    func testUpdatingCleanupEnabledPersistsToUserDefaults() throws {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+
+        store.cleanupEnabled = false
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(defaults.object(forKey: "cleanupEnabled") as? Bool, false)
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,115 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class SpeechModelManagerTests: XCTestCase {
+    @MainActor
+    func testUnknownModelTransitionsToErrorWithoutCallingLoader() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: "missing-model")
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .error)
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.calls, [])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testUncachedWhisperModelDownloadsThenLoadsWithRequiredRuntimeOptions() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = []
+
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .ready)
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.calls, ["isCached:openai_whisper-small.en", "download:openai_whisper-small.en", "load:openai_whisper-small.en"])
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.lastWhisperOptions, WhisperRuntimeOptions(
+            verbose: false,
+            logLevel: .errorOnly,
+            prewarm: false,
+            load: true
+        ))
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testCachedWhisperModelLoadsWithoutDownloading() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .ready)
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.calls, ["isCached:openai_whisper-small.en", "load:openai_whisper-small.en"])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testLoadRequestClearsPreviousErrorAndMovesBackToLoading() async {
+        let loader = TestSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.suspendLoad = true
+
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+
+        await manager.load(modelID: "missing-model")
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .error)
+
+        let task = Task { await manager.load(modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id) }
+        await Task.yield()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(manager.phase, .loading)
+        XCTAssertNil(manager.errorMessage)
+
+        loader.resume()
+        await task.value
+    }
+}
+
+private final class TestSpeechModelLoader: SpeechModelLoading {
+    var cachedModelIDs: Set<String> = []
+    var calls: [String] = []
+    var lastWhisperOptions: WhisperRuntimeOptions?
+    var suspendLoad = false
+
+    private var continuation: CheckedContinuation<Void, Never>?
+
+    func isCached(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor) async throws -> Bool {
+        calls.append("isCached:\(model.id)")
+        return cachedModelIDs.contains(model.id)
+    }
+
+    func download(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor, progress: @escaping (Double) -> Void) async throws {
+        calls.append("download:\(model.id)")
+        progress(1.0)
+    }
+
+    func load(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor, whisperOptions: WhisperRuntimeOptions) async throws {
+        calls.append("load:\(model.id)")
+        lastWhisperOptions = whisperOptions
+
+        if suspendLoad {
+            await withCheckedContinuation { continuation in
+                self.continuation = continuation
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    func resume() {
+        suspendLoad = false
+        continuation?.resume()
+        continuation = nil
+    }
+}
